channel.title: Comments on: Heavy Seas, Prosit! – Ep. 112
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Edmond M.
item.dc:creator: Edmond M.
item.description: Heavy Seas makes some great beer. Hopefully you were able to try The Great Pumpkin and The Great'er Pumpkin (Barrel Aged). Those are two of my favorites along with Below Decks Barleywine. Also David more to your point. They actually have three fleets Pyrate Fleet: Bottle Conditioned, beers typically in the 7-8%abv Mutiny Fleet: Beers over 8% Clipper Fleet: Beer below 6%
item.content:encoded:
Heavy Seas makes some great beer. Hopefully you were able to try The Great Pumpkin and The Great’er Pumpkin (Barrel Aged). Those are two of my favorites along with Below Decks Barleywine.
Also David more to your point. They actually have three fleets
Pyrate Fleet: Bottle Conditioned, beers typically in the 7-8%abv
Mutiny Fleet: Beers over 8%
Clipper Fleet: Beer below 6%

item.title: By: David
item.dc:creator: David
item.description: The lower alcohol line of beers at Heavy Seas is now called "The Clipper Fleet" (http://www.hsbeer.com/beers/clipper-fleet). The Märzen (http://www.hsbeer.com/marzen) is in this group and an excellent year-round, lower-alcohol, version of Prosit!
item.content:encoded: The lower alcohol line of beers at Heavy Seas is now called “The Clipper Fleet” (http://www.hsbeer.com/beers/clipper-fleet). The Märzen (http://www.hsbeer.com/marzen) is in this group and an excellent year-round, lower-alcohol, version of Prosit!

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description:
CONGRATS JOHN!!! I just got the news of Mr. Pinkerton's GOLD medal for the Rosemary Swamp Fox!!! I'll be raising a glass of my IPA later today (just woke up) in honor of this great achievement!
Congratulations!
item.content:encoded:
CONGRATS JOHN!!!
I just got the news of Mr. Pinkerton’s GOLD medal for the Rosemary Swamp Fox!!!
I’ll be raising a glass of my IPA later today (just woke up) in honor of this great achievement!

Congratulations!

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description:
I poured myself an American Brown watching the show. Not quite the same but it's one of my maltier beers.
Thanks for the show! Good job as always.
PROST!!!
item.content:encoded:
I poured myself an American Brown watching the show.
Not quite the same but it’s one of my maltier beers.

Thanks for the show!
Good job as always.

PROST!!!
